annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest under Wyo. Stat. Ann. 1-16-102 — 10% per year, fixed by statute (simple interest). POST-judgment only (this statute governs interest on decrees/judgments from date of rendition; prejudgment interest is a separate common-law/contract… Verify against the statute; not legal advice.
